stemHtml: During flight the headwind increases suddenly due to wind shear. What initial effect does that have on true airspeed?

options.a: There will be a sudden temporary increase in true air speed.
options.b: None, since wind only affects ground speed and drift.
options.c: There will be a sudden temporary decrease in true air speed.
options.d: There will only be a gradual increase in true airspeed until equilibrium is established again.
